overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with a sword on their back running through a neon-lit downtown district at night. The character navigates sidewalks and crosswalks beneath elevated highways covered in glitching, colorful LED displays, passing futuristic billboards, toll booths, and sparse traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk beneath elevated highway with glitching digital billboard

agents.ego_description: sprinting along the sidewalk next to a metal guardrail, approaching a wide intersection

entered.detail: tall concrete pillar with large glitching digital screen displaying distorted colors
elevated highway structure wrapped in glitching rainbow LED strips
low concrete wall separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a narrow sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, passing a tall pillar with a glitching digital billboard. The colorful LED-wrapped overpass looms ahead as the character approaches a wide intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide intersection with yellow striped crosswalk beneath colorful light bridge

events.description: steps off sidewalk onto wide crosswalk with prominent yellow stripes
black sports car drives past from right to left across the intersection

agents.ego_description: sprinting across the wide intersection beneath the colorful elevated highway

notable_agents.action: black sports car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing lines
concrete wall covered in white and black graffiti tags

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a wide intersection marked with bold yellow stripes, passing beneath the massive elevated highway covered in glitching rainbow lights. A black sports car speeds past as the character reaches the opposite sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: toll entry plaza with NO ENTRY signs and overhead gantries

events.description: passes under toll booth gantry with illuminated red NO ENTRY signs
white sedan and red car pass by on the adjacent street

agents.ego_description: running along the sidewalk past toll gates and advertising pillars

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white tank top walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: overhead structure with red illuminated NO ENTRY signs and lane numbers

segments.scene_description: The character runs past a toll plaza marked with red NO ENTRY signs, navigating around a pedestrian while cars pass on the street. The colorful light bridge recedes into the background as urban advertising pillars dominate the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with large DREAM ON billboard and scattered urban debris

events.description: passes large billboard displaying DREAM ON advertisement with character image
character swerves slightly to avoid pedestrian while maintaining speed

agents.ego_description: sprinting along the sidewalk past large billboards and street furniture

notable_agents.action: character in dark clothing with glowing green elements walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large rectangular billboard displaying DREAM ON text with portrait image
abandoned couches and trash bins scattered along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character runs past a massive DREAM ON billboard and discarded street furniture including couches and trash bins. Other pedestrians appear on the sidewalk as the character navigates through the neon-lit downtown corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown street with tall building marked 03 and stacked holographic advertisements

events.description: flying vehicle passes overhead in the distance between buildings

agents.ego_description: continuing to sprint along the sidewalk toward the distant city center

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: skyscraper with large illuminated 03 sign near the top
multiple layered holographic advertisements stacked vertically on building facade
elevated walkway connecting buildings across the street

segments.scene_description: The character continues running toward a towering skyscraper marked with 03, passing beneath stacked holographic billboards. A flying vehicle passes overhead as the character follows a pedestrian deeper into the neon-drenched city center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit downtown district that shifts from the shadow of an elevated highway into the heart of a towering city center. It begins with the character running along a narrow sidewalk beneath a glitching digital billboard, moving toward a wide intersection where a rainbow-lit overpass looms overhead. As the character crosses the yellow-striped street and a black sports car speeds past, the scene opens up to a toll plaza marked with red signs and urban advertising pillars. The camera then follows the character past a massive DREAM ON billboard and discarded street furniture, navigating through a crowd of pedestrians in the neon corridor. Finally, the view expands toward a towering skyscraper marked with 03 as a flying vehicle passes overhead, drawing the character deeper into the holographic glow of the city center.
